## What changed

Describe the user-visible skill, tooling, documentation, or demo behavior.

## Why

Link the issue or real usage evidence that motivated the change.

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_repository.py`
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Relevant Flutter analyzer/tests
- [ ] Updated or added eval when behavior changed
- [ ] Inspected any changed golden screenshots

## Scope and evidence

List raw artifacts, compatibility limits, and anything intentionally left unchanged.
